normalizationSummary: Use the six business layouts as the base for evergreen business promo and educational square posts.
whyNow: This pack is one of the cleanest general-business sources in the library.

candidateTemplates.name: Business Promo Square
candidateTemplates.contentGoal: Promote an offer, service, or featured business message.
candidateTemplates.rationale: Straightforward conversion template for many industries.

candidateTemplates.name: Business Education Square
candidateTemplates.contentGoal: Share a tip, explainer, or simple business lesson.
candidateTemplates.rationale: Pairs well with Posterboy's simple, practical messaging direction.
